case-open.note: v2 — regenerated from case-closed (image_input) so it is the SAME case, opened; stemless in-ear buds. supersedes flat sport-case v1.

bud-hero.note: v3 — STEMMED bud (head + stem/leg down) to match the seated buds. v1 stemmed-wrong-style, v2 stemless-wrong; v3 correct.

bud-exploded.note: v4 — faithful explosion of the EXACT bud-hero-v3 (fed as image_input): same head/stem/ring, shell opened, parts pull out; blank battery, no text. Gemini SAME_BUD/REASSEMBLES/NO_TEXT all PASS.

video_v1_superseded.note: SUPERSEDED — product morphed (wrong open case + stemless bud). Refs fixed, regenerated as v2.

video.note: v2 — corrected refs + return-to-case ending; 8s, long explosion hold for labels.
